metadata.description: A repository of prescriptive plugins and tools designed to provide a high-performance experience for building and deploying agentic applications across the Google Data Cloud ecosystem.

plugins.name: alloydb
plugins.description: Create, connect, and interact with an AlloyDB for PostgreSQL database and data.

plugins.name: alloydb-omni
plugins.description: Create, connect, and interact with an AlloyDB Omni database and data.

plugins.name: bigquery-data-analytics
plugins.description: Connect, query, and generate data insights for BigQuery datasets and data.

plugins.name: bigtable
plugins.description: Connect, query, and interact with Cloud Bigtable.

plugins.name: cloud-sql-mysql
plugins.description: Connect and interact with a Cloud SQL for MySQL database and data.

plugins.name: cloud-sql-postgresql
plugins.description: Create, connect, and interact with a Cloud SQL for PostgreSQL database and data.

plugins.name: cloud-sql-sqlserver
plugins.description: Connect to Cloud SQL for SQL Server.

plugins.name: dataproc
plugins.description: Connect and interact with Google Cloud Dataproc.

plugins.name: firestore-native
plugins.description: Connect and interact with Cloud Firestore.

plugins.name: data-agent-kit-starter-pack
plugins.description: This plugin provides a specialized suite of skills for data engineers and database practitioners working on Google Cloud. It acts as an expert assistant, allowing you to use natural language prompts in your preferred coding agent to architect complex data pipelines, transform data with dbt, write Spark and BigQuery SQL notebooks, and orchestrate end-to-end workflows across GCP's data ecosystem.

plugins.name: dataplex
plugins.description: Connect to Dataplex Universal Catalog to discover, manage, monitor, and govern data and AI artifacts across your data platform.

plugins.name: oracledb
plugins.description: Connect, query, and interact with Oracle Databases and their data within Gemini CLI.

plugins.name: spanner
plugins.description: Connect and interact with Spanner data using natural language.
